---
name: pull-requesting
description: Creates well-structured pull requests
---

<!-- PromptScript 2026-03-04T21:41:05.478Z - do not edit -->

## PR Structure

```markdown
## Summary

Brief description (1-3 sentences).

## Changes

- Bullet points of changes
- Link to issues: Fixes #123

## Test Plan

- [ ] Verification steps
```

## Best Practices

- Small PRs (< 400 lines)
- Single concern per PR
- Explain WHY, not just WHAT
